title: Addie's Tools
description: Gives unique designs and a sense of progression to all the different tiers of tools and swords
body:
A resource pack I originally made only for myself, but decided to release publicly. After getting over 10,000 downloads on CurseForge(WOW!!!), it's clear that lots of people other than me enjoy it, so I've decided to release it here as well. :> 

It aims to give all the different tool/sword tiers in the game unique designs from each other, rather than being simple recolors, while sticking to the vanilla style to the best of my abilities.

# Changes include:

- Sprites for Wooden, Stone, Golden, Diamond, and Netherite tools and swords have all been redesigned to look more distinct from each other, as well as to give tools/swords in the same tier similar design themes

- Sprites for the Bow (including its charging animation) have been freshened up a bit with some nicer colors. Additionally, the arrow tip has been made slightly larger, and the arrow's feather has been made visible

- Inventory sprites for Arrow, Tipped Arrow, and Spectral arrow have been tweaked

- A few tools have been renamed: Golden Axe > Golden Battle Axe, Netherite Axe > Netherite Battle Axe, Netherite Hoe > Netherite Scythe

- Slight color change on the Iron Sword's handle end

- Iron tools all receive the handle end that the Iron Sword has

- Interfaces for the Anvil and Smithing table edited slightly to give the hammers decorative handle ends

I hope you enjoy it!! :>

**All original textures found within this pack may NOT be redistributed without my permission.**
